mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, spu_name, sku_id, sku_sn, sku_name, pic_url, price, quantity, total_amount FROM oms_order_item WHERE order_id=#{orderId}

SELECT oi.id, oi.order_id, oi.spu_name, oi.sku_id, oi.sku_sn, oi.sku_name, oi.pic_url, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.total_amount, oi.deleted, oi.create_time, oi.update_time, o.order_sn -- 订单号 FROM oms_order_item oi LEFT JOIN oms_order o ON oi.order_id = o.id
AND spu_name LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.spuName}, '%')
AND sku_sn LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.skuSn}, '%')
AND sku_name LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.skuName}, '%')
AND oi.deleted LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.deleted}, '%')
AND o.order_sn LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.orderSn}, '%')
SELECT oi.*, o.order_sn, o.customer_name, o.order_status, o.total_amount as order_total_amount FROM oms_order_item oi LEFT JOIN oms_order o ON oi.order_id = o.id WHERE oi.id = #{id}
